## Type of change

- [ ] Skill — adds or edits catalog content (`catalog/`)
- [ ] Code — tool feature, fix, or refactor
- [ ] Docs / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] CI passes (build + tests + `andes validate`)
- [ ] Skills: each `SKILL.md` has frontmatter (`name` + `description`)
- [ ] Code: added/updated tests, `go test ./...` is green
